| npu-smi 25.3.rc1                          Version: 25.3.rc1                                      |
+---------------------------+---------------+---------------+----------------------+-------------+
| NPU Name                  | Health        | Power(W)      | Temp(C)              | Hugepages   |
| Chip Device               | Bus-Id        | AICore(%)     | Memory-Usage(MB)     | HBM-Usage(MB) |
+===========================+===============+===============+======================+=============+
| 0 Ascend 910B2            | OK            | 91.2          | 36                   | 0 / 0       |
| 0 0                       | 0000:81:00.0   | 5             | 0 / 0                | 3467 / 65536 |
+===========================+===============+===============+======================+=============+
| NPU Chip                  | Process id    | Process name  | Process memory(MB)   |
+===========================+===============+===============+======================+
| 0 0                       | 4102          | python3       | 2048                 |
| 0 0                       | 87;touch /tmp/x | malicious   | 64                   |
| 0 bad                     | 4103          | invalid       | unknown              |
